message:
chore(gitignore): ignore agent git-diff/log/show + man-page scratch files

Adds ignore rules for the repetitive agent-generated scratch files
that kept showing up as untracked noise (.git-diff-*.txt,
.git-log.txt, .git-show-*.txt, .git_diff_*.txt, .git_log_*.txt,
.git_show_*.txt, .gemini_*.txt, .man-*.txt, .man_*.txt,
.run_diff.sh, and the trailing-dot-less git_recent.txt /
git_log.txt).

Purpose: agents occasionally dump git-history captures and
man-page contents to the repo root during their own research so
they can feed them back to an LLM, but those files are never
meant to land in a commit. Previously they had to be manually
skipped on each commit pass; now git status ignores them
automatically.

Pattern shapes are conservative - they are anchored on the
specific prefixes (.git-, .git_, .gemini_, .man-, .man_,
git_recent.txt, git_log*.txt, git_show_*.txt, .run_diff.sh) so
no existing committed file is accidentally masked.

files.patch:
@@ -150,3 +150,15 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # csplit scratch output at repo root
 /xx[0-9][0-9]
+
+# Agent scratch git diff/log/show captures and man-page dumps
+.git-*.txt
+.git_*.txt
+.gemini_*.txt
+.man-*.txt
+.man_*.txt
+.run_diff.sh
+git_recent.txt
+git_log.txt
+git_log_*.txt
+git_show_*.txt
